name: reflect
description: Reflect on your own working session — the one reflexive, cross-cutting family (the work process itself, not the code/decisions/docs/reasoning the other plugins operate on); it sits across the object-families, not parallel to them. Three seed skills, three time-stances on the same session: catchup (orient — where the work stands now + next, rebuilt from git/diff/plan, not chat memory), summarize (recap — a complete, objective account of what the session did, the raw input observe distills), observe (distill — the one durable, reusable learning into a knowledge base). The triad is orient -> recap -> distill. Read-only except observe's single write. Cross-project, language-agnostic.
